nasb.text: In Ecbatana in the fortress, which is in the province of Media, a scroll was found and there was written in it as follows: “Memorandum—

esv.text: And in Ecbatana, the citadel that is in the province of Media, a scroll was found on which this was written: “A record.

cnv.text: 在瑪代省的亞馬他宮中，發現了一卷書卷。其中寫著這樣的一段記錄：

ccb.text: 在玛代省亚马他城的宫内找到一卷书，书中记载如下：
